summary: Iteration 52 - Frontend testing for user complaints. All 5 complaints verified RESOLVED: 1) Forms download buttons work (handleDownload with iOS fallback and toast), 2) How It Works page has all 6 detailed steps with visual guides, 3) Legal Framework page EXISTS with all 8 states, 4) Delete Case button visible with red styling, 5) Mobile responsive views working for all tested pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 user complaints verified resolved. Forms page download triggers correctly (blob URL with toast.success). How It Works page has 6 detailed steps with sticky navigation tabs, colour-coded headers, 'What You'll See' sections, Pro Tips, document upload priority table, and 3-tier pricing (FREE, $150, $200). Legal Framework page exists at /legal-framework with all 8 states (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT) expandable with legislation links. Delete Case button has data-testid='delete-case-btn' with red styling in CaseDetail header. Mobile views at 390px width tested and working for How It Works, Forms, and Legal Framework pages.

form_download.implementation: handleDownload creates blob URL, triggers download via anchor click, iOS fallback opens new tab, toast.success shows notification

how_it_works_page.document_upload_table: Present in Step 2 with priority levels

legal_framework_page.states_found: 8/8 - NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT
legal_framework_page.expandable_sections: Working - click to expand legislation acts

delete_case_button.styling: red-500 text with hover:bg-red-50 (red styling confirmed)

mobile_responsive.how_it_works: WORKING - mobile menu visible, step tabs scrollable, pricing visible
mobile_responsive.forms_page: WORKING - search input visible, state filters accessible

tests_performed: How It Works page - 6 steps, step navigation tabs, pricing section
Forms page - download buttons with toast notification
Legal Framework page - all 8 states present with expandable sections
Delete Case button on CaseDetail page
Mobile responsive - How It Works at 390px
